title: Hackreels - Animate your code
description: Create effortlessly beautiful code animations in seconds. Hackreels detects code changes automatically and makes stunning animations based on those changes.
author: David Parks

title: MUX - Visualize video stats
description: An article on how to showcase your video stats by creating a dynamic animated video using Remotion and the Mux Data API.
author: Dave Kiss

title: Next.js - Video tutorial
description: Delba Oliveira visually explains Vercel's Next.js and the concept of React.
author: Delba Oliveira

title: GitHub Unwrapped - Campaign
description: A year-in-review video campaign for GitHub, where each user gets a personalized video based on their GitHub activity.
author: Remotion

title: Revid - Storytelling social media videos
description: Revid allows creators to turn ideas into social media videos in minutes. It is an AI-powered platform to generate short-form storytelling. Remotion is build to preview andrender the videos on the platform.
author: Tibo

title: AnimStats - Animated statistics
description: With AnimStats, you can transform your statistics into captivating animated GIFs and Videos within minutes.
author: Audiencon

title: Banger Show - Music visuals
description: High quality music visuals without learning 3D or video editing software.

title: Watercolor Map - Animated map
description: A travel animation showing the journey on a map, with watercolor effects. Perfect for adding b-roll footage to travel video projects.
author: Remotion

title: Submagic - Viral shorts
description: Make your short-form videos more captivating with Captions, B-Rolls, Zooms and Sound Effects.
author: Submagic

title: HeyGen - Video Agent
description: Fully made with HeyGen's Video Agent, powered by Remotion. Avatar, script, motion graphics, and final edits were all created just by prompting.
author: Joshua Xu

title: Hello Météo - Weather app
description: A weather report generator, which gets OpenWeather data and renders a video with the forecast on a daily basis. It also creates a story on social media.
author: Florent Pergoud

title: Electricity Maps - Data visualization
description: A visualization of heavy electricity data in Europe. It shows fluctuations in grid emissions on the map, as well as the daily country variations in a chart.
author: Electricity Maps

title: Remotion Recorder - Screencast videos
description: Fully featured screen recording software built with Remotion. Record your screen, webcam, and audio. Edit and render the video for multiple platforms quickly in the same tool.
author: Remotion

title: Fluidmotion - Animated video backgrounds
description: Create beautiful animated background for apps, videos or presentations.

title: MyKaraoke - Karaoke video maker
description: MyKaraoke is a tool that effortlessly creates karaoke and lyric videos with AI-powered vocal removal and automatic lyric syncing, all without downloads or installations.
author: Emiliano Parizzi

title: Relay.app - Automation tool
description: Remotion was utilized to create dynamic, programmatically generated instructional videos, ensuring explainer content remained consistent with the brand standards.

title: Vibrantsnap - Fast screenrecording
description: Create product demos, training videos, and youtube tutorials with auto layouts, captions, intelligent zoom, and 4K export.
author: Philippe Tedajo

title: AdmoveAI - Ecommerce ads
description: Admove is an automated advertising platform to create, launch and grow high-performing eCommerce campaigns. Remotion is used to build and render videos on the platfrom.

title: SuperMotion - Product Videos
description: Create engaging product promo videos from screen recordings or screenshots. Add device mockups, zooms animations, annotations, and transitions. SuperMotion uses Remotion to render videos in the cloud.
author: Jim Raptis

title: Clippulse - Animated social media videos
description: Clippulse is a dynamic tool to easily produce fully customizable videos for brands, without any prior video editing experience required.

title: Exemplary AI - Viral shorts
description: Repurpose your existing video into multiple viral short clips.

title: Podopi - Convert a blog to podcast
description: This promo video is done by using Remotion. It shows you how easily you can extend your blog to a podcast.

description: Online memorial photo slideshow maker. Create a fitting tribute video for your loved one.

title: Music Player
description: A music player visualization for teasing tracks on Instagram.

title: The math behind animations
description: William Candillon explains the fundamentals of how trigonometry is used for user interfaces. Full video available on YouTube.

title: Video Animation - Liquid Swipe
description: This intro warms you up for an awesome React Native tutorial on how to recreate a Liquid Swipe animation.

description: A MIDI-to-Remotion converter visualizing how to play a song on the piano.

description: In this video you get a visual display of some quantitative information.
